Source: Azure OpenAI API Reference
URL: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/ai-services/openai/reference
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Azure OpenAI REST API Reference

## API Versions
- Data Plane Inference: v1 (GA: 2024-10-21), v1 preview
- Control Plane: 2025-06-01 (GA), 2025-07-01-preview

## Key Endpoints
- Completions: POST /openai/deployments/{id}/completions
- Chat Completions: POST /openai/deployments/{id}/chat/completions
- Embeddings: POST /openai/deployments/{id}/embeddings
- Audio Transcriptions/Translations: POST /audio/transcriptions, /audio/translations
- Image Generation: POST /openai/deployments/{id}/images/generations

## Authentication
- API Key (Header: api-key)
- Microsoft Entra ID (Bearer token)

## Key Features
- Content Filtering (hate, sexual, violence, self-harm, profanity, protected material)
- Streaming (server-sent events)
- Tool/Function Calling (max 128 functions)
- Vision capabilities
- RAG Extensions (Azure Search, Cosmos DB)
- Structured Outputs (JSON Schema)
- Parallel Tool Calls
- Log Probabilities
- Deterministic Sampling (seed-based, beta)

## Deprecated Features
- function_call parameter (use tool_choice instead)
- functions parameter (use tools instead)
- max_tokens in newer models (use max_completion_tokens)

## Status
- Production Ready: GA version 2024-10-21
- Active Development: Monthly preview releases
- Migration Notice: New preview inference API available
- Document Updated: 2026-03-14
